title: PS-69528: fixed all punch-item related bugs and issues
body: PS-69528: fixed all punch-item related bugs and issues
author: abarati

review_comments.body: Is this comment outdated in the _quickLinkCreated path? Seems to be written when showDialog was called synchronously.
review_comments.author: sevilbk-trimble

review_comments.body: 200 is a magic number. Can we extract it into a named constant like QUICKLINK_POPUP_DELAY_MS?
review_comments.author: sevilbk-trimble

review_comments.body: I couldn't find a matching removeEventListener in the cleanup path (unlike the annotationManager listeners). It seems to be safe, but worth noting.
review_comments.author: sevilbk-trimble
